name: Capital Bancorp Inc
summary: Capital Bancorp Inc is a bank holding company operating Capital Bank, N.A., offering commercial real estate and commercial business loans, residential mortgage banking, SBA and USDA government-guaranteed lending, and the OpenSky credit card division. The company also acquired Integrated Financial Holdings, Inc. (IFH), which includes Windsor Advantage, a platform servicing and packaging SBA and USDA loans on behalf of other lenders.
